name: Patient 50
history: Longstanding friendship with Ethan since high school (14 years). Shared personal crises and professional collaborations. Learned Ethan has been abusive toward girlfriend.
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: My long friendship with an abuser makes me complicit and morally compromised.
intermediate_belief_depression: I've invested years in a friendship with someone who is fundamentally abusive.
coping_strategies: Observation of concerning behavior, distress about moral implications.
situation: Learning about Ethan's abusive behavior toward partner and feeling distressed. Observing erratic behavior and substance use at recent gathering.
auto_thought: The person I've considered my closest friend is actually an abuser.
behavior: Learn about friend's abusive behavior and observe concerning signs.
